\" alt=\"Imagen pegada\" data-editable-image=\"true\" draggable=\"true\" style=\"width: 100%; display: block; margin: 1rem auto; max-width: 100%;\"></p><h3 id=\"titulo-9-mrbxr1nl\"><span style=\"font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 900;\">Nivel</span></h3><p></p><div><div><section class=\"study-block study-block-blue study-content-normal\" contenteditable=\"false\" data-study-block=\"true\" data-block-size=\"normal\">\n        <div class=\"study-block-label\" contenteditable=\"true\" spellcheck=\"false\">NIVEL</div>\n        <div class=\"study-block-body\" contenteditable=\"true\">El nivel de un nodo coincide con su profundidad. Los nodos de un árbol de altura h se clasifican en h + 1 niveles que van desde el 0 hasta h, de tal forma que el nivel i lo forman los nodos de profundidad i.</div>\n      </section><section class=\"study-code-block study-content-normal\" contenteditable=\"false\" data-code-language=\"C++\" data-study-block=\"true\" data-block-size=\"normal\">\n        <div class=\"study-code-header\">\n          <span><strong>Codigo</strong> · C++</span>\n          <span class=\"study-code-actions\">\n            <button type=\"button\" data-code-action=\"copy\" contenteditable=\"false\">Copiar</button>\n            <button type=\"button\" data-code-action=\"edit\" contenteditable=\"false\">Editar</button>\n            <button type=\"button\" data-code-action=\"delete\" contenteditable=\"false\">Eliminar</button>\n          </span>\n        </div>\n        <pre class=\"study-code-content\" contenteditable=\"true\"><span class=\"code-token-comment\">//NIVEL --&gt;
